box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
Short-Term Memory
(Working Memory)
• System prompt
• Conversation history
• Tool outputs
Scope: current session only
Storage: context window (RAM)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 200px; height: 1px; padding-top: 71px; margin-left: 606px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Long-Term Memory
• Persists across sessions
• User preferences
• Learned behaviors
Scope: cross-session
Storage: database / vector DB

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 200px; height: 1px; padding-top: 456px; margin-left: 31px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Episodic Memory
• Past events & experiences
• Specific interaction history
• Retrieved by semantic sim.
Example: past trip bookings
Storage: vector DB (embeddings)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 200px; height: 1px; padding-top: 456px; margin-left: 606px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Semantic Memory
• General facts & knowledge
• Domain policies, FAQs
• Product catalogs
Example: visa rules, pricing
Storage: knowledge base / RAG

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.div:
Procedural Memory
• Learned skills & workflows
• Optimal action sequences
• Effective tool use patterns
Example: best flight booking flow
Storage: system prompt / fine-tune
